aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.subtitle: Batumi's leading non-surgical aesthetic clinic, bringing together world-class practitioners and cutting-edge treatments
aboutPage.storyP1: Silk Beauty Salon was founded with a simple vision: to provide the highest quality aesthetic treatments in a luxurious, welcoming environment. Located on Zurab Gorgiladze Street in Batumi, our clinic brings together some of Georgia's most talented aesthetic practitioners.
aboutPage.storyP2: We believe that everyone deserves to feel confident and beautiful. Our approach focuses on enhancing your natural features rather than changing who you are. We take pride in our subtle, refined results that help you look like the best version of yourself.
aboutPage.storyP3: From the moment you step into our clinic, you'll experience the difference. Our commitment to excellence extends beyond our treatments to every aspect of your visit, from our luxurious clinic space to our warm, attentive team.

values.patientCareDesc: Your comfort, safety, and satisfaction are our top priorities.
values.excellenceDesc: We use only premium products and the latest techniques for optimal results.
values.safetyDesc: All treatments are performed by qualified medical professionals.
values.naturalResultsDesc: We enhance your natural beauty with subtle, refined treatments.

aboutPage.teamSubtitle: Our expert practitioners bring years of experience and a passion for excellence

team.ninoBio: Nino is the founder of Silk Beauty Salon and a renowned aesthetic practitioner with over 15 years of experience in the beauty industry. She is known for her natural-looking results and meticulous attention to detail.
team.ketevanBio: Ketevan is a highly skilled aesthetic practitioner specializing in dermal fillers and skin treatments. Her gentle approach and artistic eye ensure beautiful, natural results for every client.
team.mariamBio: Mariam brings a wealth of knowledge in advanced skin treatments and laser therapy. She is passionate about helping clients achieve their skin goals through personalized treatment plans.
team.sophiaBio: Sophia specializes in non-surgical facial rejuvenation and has extensive experience in anti-wrinkle treatments and dermal fillers. Her clients love her natural, fresh approach.

team.ninoBio: Nino is the founder of Silk Beauty Salon and a renowned aesthetic practitioner with over 15 years of experience in the beauty industry. She is known for her natural-looking results and meticulous attention to detail.
team.ketevanBio: Ketevan is a highly skilled aesthetic practitioner specializing in dermal fillers and skin treatments. Her gentle approach and artistic eye ensure beautiful, natural results for every client.

faqs.consultationQuestion: What should I expect during my first consultation?
faqs.consultationAnswer: During your initial consultation, we'll discuss your concerns, goals, and medical history. Our practitioner will examine your skin and facial anatomy before recommending appropriate treatments. We believe in honest, transparent advice and will never recommend unnecessary treatments.
faqs.painAnswer: Most treatments involve minimal discomfort. We use topical numbing cream where appropriate, and many of our dermal fillers contain built-in local anesthetic. Our practitioners are skilled in making treatments as comfortable as possible.
faqs.resultsAnswer: This depends on the treatment. Anti-wrinkle injections typically last 3-6 months, dermal fillers 6-18 months depending on the product and area treated, and skin tightening treatments can provide results lasting 1-2 years. We'll discuss expected duration during your consultation.
faqs.downtimeAnswer: Many of our treatments have minimal to no downtime. Some treatments may cause temporary swelling, redness, or bruising. We'll provide detailed aftercare instructions and advice on timing treatments around social commitments.
faqs.bookingQuestion: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.bookingAnswer: You can book online through our website, call us at +995 599 123 456, or email info@silkbeauty.ge. We recommend booking consultations in advance as we often have a waiting list.
faqs.virtualAnswer: Yes, we offer virtual consultations for those who cannot visit the salon initially. However, for treatments requiring precise assessment, an in-person consultation is recommended.
faqs.brandsQuestion: What brands of products do you use?
faqs.brandsAnswer: We use only premium, certified products from leading brands including Allergan (Juvederm), Galderma (Restylane), and Merz. For skin treatments, we use medical-grade products from iS Clinical, Obagi, and Mesoestetic.
faqs.qualifiedAnswer: All our practitioners are fully qualified and experienced professionals. They undergo continuous training in the latest techniques and safety protocols to ensure the highest standards of care.

termsConditions.title: Terms & Conditions
termsConditions.subtitle: Terms governing your use of our website and services
termsConditions.acceptanceText: By accessing and using the Silk Beauty Salon website and services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use our website or services.
termsConditions.servicesText: Silk Beauty Salon provides aesthetic and beauty treatments. All treatments are performed by qualified professionals in accordance with industry standards and local regulations. Results may vary between individuals.
termsConditions.bookingItem1: Appointments must be booked through our official booking system or by phone
termsConditions.bookingItem2: A consultation may be required before certain treatments
termsConditions.bookingItem3: We reserve the right to refuse service if contraindications are identified
termsConditions.bookingItem4: Clients must arrive 15 minutes before their scheduled appointment
termsConditions.cancellationText: We understand that circumstances may change. Please provide at least 24 hours' notice for cancellations or rescheduling. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a fee.
termsConditions.paymentItem1: Payment is due at the time of service unless otherwise agreed
termsConditions.paymentItem2: We accept cash and major credit cards
termsConditions.paymentItem3: Gift vouchers must be presented at the time of booking
termsConditions.paymentItem4: All prices are in Georgian Lari (GEL) and include applicable taxes
termsConditions.refundText: Treatment packages are non-refundable. In case of dissatisfaction with a treatment, please contact us within 7 days so we can address your concerns appropriately.
termsConditions.medicalText: Our treatments are not a substitute for medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.
termsConditions.intellectualText: All content on this website, including text, images, logos, and design, is the property of Silk Beauty Salon and is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.
termsConditions.liabilityText: To the fullest extent permitted by law, Silk Beauty Salon shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of our services.
termsConditions.governingText: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the laws of Georgia. Any disputes arising from these terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Batumi, Georgia.
termsConditions.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting to the website. Your continued use of our services constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
termsConditions.contactText: For questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at

careers.title: Careers
careers.subtitle: Join our team of passionate professionals dedicated to enhancing natural beauty
careers.whyWorkText: At Silk Beauty Salon, we believe that our team is our greatest asset. We are committed to creating an environment where talented professionals can thrive, grow, and make a real difference in our clients' lives. Join us in delivering exceptional aesthetic treatments and experiences.
careers.benefit1Desc: We offer industry-leading compensation packages with performance bonuses.
careers.benefit2Desc: Continuous training and certification opportunities to advance your career.
careers.benefit3Desc: Work in a modern, luxurious clinic with state-of-the-art equipment.
careers.benefit4Desc: Join a supportive team that values collaboration and excellence.
careers.openingsSubtitle: We are always looking for talented individuals to join our team
careers.job1Desc: We are seeking experienced aesthetic practitioners to join our growing team.
careers.job2Desc: Friendly and professional receptionist to manage client bookings and inquiries.
careers.job3Desc: Licensed skincare specialist with experience in facial treatments and consultations.
careers.noRoleText: We're always interested in meeting talented professionals. Send us your CV and we'll keep you in mind for future opportunities.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information
privacyPolicy.introText: Silk Beauty Salon ("we," "our," or "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacyPolicy.collectIntro: We may collect the following types of information:
privacyPolicy.collectItem1: Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number, and other contact details you provide when booking appointments or contacting us.
privacyPolicy.collectItem2: Medical Information: Health and treatment history necessary for providing aesthetic services.
privacyPolicy.collectItem3: Usage Data: Information about how you use our website, including IP address, browser type, and pages visited.
privacyPolicy.collectItem4: Cookies: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience.
privacyPolicy.useIntro: We use your personal information for the following purposes:
privacyPolicy.useItem1: To provide and manage our aesthetic services
privacyPolicy.useItem3: To communicate with you about treatments and promotions
privacyPolicy.useItem4: To improve our website and services
privacyPolicy.sharingText: We do not sell your personal information. We may share your data with:
privacyPolicy.sharingItem1: Service providers who assist in our operations
privacyPolicy.sharingItem2: Healthcare professionals when necessary for treatment
privacyPolicy.sharingItem3: Legal authorities when required by law
privacyPolicy.securityText: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacyPolicy.rightsIntro: Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:
privacyPolicy.rightsItem1: Right to access your personal data
privacyPolicy.rightsItem3: Right to request deletion of your data
privacyPolicy.contactIntro: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, please contact us:
privacyPolicy.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

botox.name: Botox Injectables
botox.description: Advanced anti-wrinkle treatments using premium botulinum toxin to smooth lines and restore youthful appearance.

anti-wrinkle.name: Anti-Wrinkle Injections
anti-wrinkle.shortDescription: Smooth away wrinkles and fine lines for a refreshed, youthful appearance.
anti-wrinkle.description: Anti-wrinkle injections are one of the most popular non-surgical cosmetic treatments available. Using botulinum toxin, we temporarily relax the facial muscles that cause wrinkles, resulting in smoother, younger-looking skin.
benefits: Reduces the appearance of fine lines and wrinkles
anti-wrinkle.howItWorks: Botulinum toxin is injected into specific facial muscles using a fine needle. The toxin blocks nerve signals to these muscles, preventing them from contracting and creating wrinkles.
anti-wrinkle.aftercare: Avoid lying down for 4 hours, avoid exercise for 24 hours, and avoid rubbing the treated area.

masseter-botox.name: Masseter Botox
masseter-botox.shortDescription: Slim the jawline and relieve teeth grinding with targeted Botox treatment.
masseter-botox.description: Masseter Botox is a specialized treatment that targets the masseter muscles to slim the face and treat teeth grinding.
benefits: Slims and contours the lower face

hyperhidrosis.name: Hyperhidrosis Treatment
hyperhidrosis.shortDescription: Effectively treat excessive sweating with long-lasting results.
hyperhidrosis.description: Hyperhidrosis treatment with Botox is a highly effective solution for excessive sweating.

migraine-treatment.name: Migraine Treatment
migraine-treatment.shortDescription: Reduce the frequency and severity of chronic migraines.
migraine-treatment.description: Botox is an FDA-approved treatment for chronic migraines.

dermal-fillers.name: Dermal Fillers
dermal-fillers.description: Restore volume, enhance features, and smooth lines with our premium hyaluronic acid dermal filler treatments.

lip-fillers.name: Lip Fillers
lip-fillers.shortDescription: Enhance lip volume and shape for beautiful, natural-looking results.
lip-fillers.description: Lip fillers are one of our most popular treatments for enhancing the shape, volume, and definition of your lips.

cheek-fillers.name: Cheek Fillers
cheek-fillers.shortDescription: Restore volume and define cheekbones for a youthful, lifted appearance.
cheek-fillers.description: Cheek fillers are an excellent way to restore volume to the mid-face and create beautiful cheekbone definition.

chin-fillers.name: Chin Fillers
chin-fillers.shortDescription: Enhance chin projection and improve facial balance.
chin-fillers.description: Chin fillers can dramatically improve your facial profile and proportions.

jaw-fillers.name: Jaw Fillers
jaw-fillers.shortDescription: Define and contour your jawline for a sculpted profile.
jaw-fillers.description: Jaw fillers are an excellent treatment for defining and contouring the jawline.

tear-fill.name: Tear Fillers
tear-fill.shortDescription: Reduce the appearance of under-eye hollows and dark circles.
tear-fill.description: Tear filler treatment addresses under-eye hollows and dark circles for a more refreshed appearance.

nose-fillers.name: Non-Surgical Rhinoplasty
nose-fillers.shortDescription: Reshape your nose without surgery using dermal fillers.
nose-fillers.description: Non-surgical rhinoplasty uses dermal fillers to reshape and contour the nose.

temple-fillers.name: Temple Fillers
temple-fillers.shortDescription: Restore volume to the temples for a more youthful appearance.
temple-fillers.description: Temple fillers restore volume to the temporal area, creating a more balanced and youthful appearance.

hand-fillers.name: Hand Fillers
hand-fillers.shortDescription: Rejuvenate aging hands with volume restoration.
hand-fillers.description: Hand fillers restore volume to the hands, reducing the appearance of veins and tendons.

skin-treatments.name: Skin Treatments
skin-treatments.description: Advanced skin treatments to address various concerns and achieve radiant, healthy skin.

skin-boosters.name: Skin Boosters
skin-boosters.shortDescription: Deep hydration for glowing, radiant skin.
skin-boosters.description: Skin boosters provide deep hydration to improve skin quality and create a radiant glow.

chemical-peels.name: Chemical Peels
chemical-peels.shortDescription: Renew your skin with professional chemical peel treatments.
chemical-peels.description: Chemical peels exfoliate the skin to reveal fresher, younger-looking skin underneath.

microneedling.name: Microneedling
microneedling.shortDescription: Stimulate collagen production for firmer, smoother skin.
microneedling.description: Microneedling stimulates the skin's natural healing process to produce collagen and elastin.

prp-therapy.name: PRP Facial
prp-therapy.shortDescription: Rejuvenate your skin using your body's own growth factors.
prp-therapy.description: PRP therapy uses your own blood platelets to rejuvenate and refresh your skin.

laser-hair.name: Laser Hair Removal
laser-hair.shortDescription: Permanent hair reduction for smooth, hair-free skin.
laser-hair.description: Laser hair removal provides long-lasting hair reduction for smooth skin.

laser-treatments.name: Laser Treatments
laser-treatments.description: State-of-the-art laser treatments for skin rejuvenation and hair removal.

co2-laser.name: CO2 Laser Resurfacing
co2-laser.shortDescription: Dramatic skin resurfacing for a youthful complexion.
co2-laser.description: CO2 laser resurfacing removes layers of damaged skin to reveal smoother, younger skin.

ipl-therapy.name: IPL Therapy
ipl-therapy.shortDescription: Treat pigmentation, sun damage, and vascular lesions.
ipl-therapy.description: IPL therapy uses light to treat various skin concerns including pigmentation and sun damage.

laser-vein.name: Laser Vein Removal
laser-vein.shortDescription: Remove unwanted veins and spider veins.
laser-vein.description: Laser vein removal safely eliminates unwanted veins on the face and body.

body-treatments.name: Body Treatments
body-treatments.description: Advanced body contouring and skin tightening treatments.

cool sculpting.name: CoolSculpting
cool sculpting.shortDescription: Non-surgical fat reduction using advanced cooling technology.
cool sculpting.description: CoolSculpting freezes and eliminates stubborn fat cells without surgery.

emtone.name: Emtone
emtone.shortDescription: Treat cellulite and improve skin texture.
emtone.description: Emtone combines thermal and mechanical energy to treat cellulite effectively.

skin-tightening.name: Radiofrequency Skin Tightening
skin-tightening.shortDescription: Non-surgical skin tightening for firmer, younger-looking skin.
skin-tightening.description: Radiofrequency skin tightening stimulates collagen production for firmer skin.

intimate-treatments.name: Intimate Treatments
intimate-treatments.description: Discreet and professional intimate rejuvenation treatments.

vaginal-rejuvenation.name: Vaginal Rejuvenation
vaginal-rejuvenation.shortDescription: Restore comfort and confidence with intimate rejuvenation.
vaginal-rejuvenation.description: Vaginal rejuvenation uses laser technology to improve vaginal health and function.

labia-filler.name: Labia Filler
labia-filler.shortDescription: Enhance comfort and aesthetics with labial filler treatment.
labia-filler.description: Labia filler treatment addresses cosmetic concerns and improves comfort.

medical-facials.name: Medical Facials
medical-facials.description: Professional medical-grade facials for optimal skin health.

hydrafacial.name: HydraFacial
hydrafacial.shortDescription: Deep cleansing, exfoliation, and hydration for radiant skin.
hydrafacial.description: HydraFacial provides deep cleansing, exfoliation, and hydration in one treatment.

deraplaning.name: Dermaplaning
deraplaning.shortDescription: Exfoliate and remove peach fuzz for smooth, radiant skin.
deraplaning.description: Dermaplaning uses a surgical blade to gently exfoliate and remove vellus hair.

hair-treatments.name: Hair Treatments
hair-treatments.description: Advanced hair restoration and scalp treatments.

prp-hair.name: PRP Hair Restoration
prp-hair.shortDescription: Stimulate hair growth with your body's own growth factors.
prp-hair.description: PRP hair restoration uses your own platelets to stimulate hair follicles and promote growth.

mesotherapy-hair.name: Hair Mesotherapy
mesotherapy-hair.shortDescription: Nutrient-rich injections to nourish the scalp and hair follicles.
mesotherapy-hair.description: Hair mesotherapy delivers essential nutrients directly to the scalp to promote hair growth.

ageing-skin.name: Ageing Skin
ageing-skin.shortDescription: Address fine lines, wrinkles, and loss of elasticity with our anti-ageing treatments.
ageing-skin.description: Ageing skin is a natural process characterized by the development of fine lines, wrinkles, loss of elasticity, and changes in skin texture and tone.

acne.name: Acne & Breakouts
acne.shortDescription: Effective treatments for clearer, healthier skin.
acne.description: Acne is a common skin condition that affects people of all ages.

pigmentation.name: Pigmentation Issues
pigmentation.shortDescription: Even out skin tone and reduce dark spots.
pigmentation.description: Pigmentation issues include dark spots, melasma, and uneven skin tone.

scars.name: Scarring
scars.shortDescription: Reduce the appearance of scars for smoother skin.
scars.description: Scarring can result from acne, injuries, or surgery.

hair-loss.name: Hair Loss
hair-loss.shortDescription: Restore hair growth with advanced treatments.
hair-loss.description: Hair loss can affect both men and women.

rosacea.name: Rosacea
rosacea.shortDescription: Manage rosacea symptoms for clearer skin.
rosacea.description: Rosacea is a chronic skin condition causing redness and visible blood vessels.

stretch-marks.name: Stretch Marks
stretch-marks.shortDescription: Reduce the appearance of stretch marks.
stretch-marks.description: Stretch marks appear when skin stretches rapidly.

cellulite.name: Cellulite
cellulite.shortDescription: Smooth and firm skin with our body treatments.
cellulite.description: Cellulite causes a dimpled appearance on the skin.

dry-skin.name: Dry & Dehydrated Skin
dry-skin.shortDescription: Restore moisture and hydration to your skin.
dry-skin.description: Dry skin can be caused by various factors including weather and aging.

sensitive-skin.name: Sensitive Skin
sensitive-skin.shortDescription: Gentle treatments for reactive skin types.
sensitive-skin.description: Sensitive skin reacts easily to products and environmental factors.
